creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Changes committed with following modifications: 
- `-s' install(1) flag used instead of strip(1)during post-install; 
- sample config file renamed into dot.ledrc, which is more BSD'ish. Also 
this sample file is not actually a documentation, so I moved it from 
share/doc to just share and removed NOPORTDOCS knob; 
- ${PREFIX} in PKGMESSAGE is now properly expanded into actual value. 

Nevertheless, thank you for submission. Please keep doing.
